# hindclaw_webhook (Resource)

Manages a Hindsight webhook.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `bank_id` (String) Bank identifier.
- `event_types` (List of String) Event types to subscribe to.
- `url` (String) Webhook URL.

### Optional

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the webhook is enabled (default true).
- `secret` (String, Sensitive) Webhook secret for signature verification. Preserved in state, may not be returned by API.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Webhook identifier (computed by server).
